svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="page3" name="Page 3 — Evaluation & Grading"> <mxGraphModel dx="706" dy="632" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="800" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" value="SumbiTheses System" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;spacingTop=5;align=center;arcSize=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="430" height="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" value="Evaluation & Grading" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="100" width="380" height="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="118" value="UC18: Lock Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="130" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="119" value="UC19: Unlock Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="195" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="120" value="UC20: Submit Grades" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="260" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="121" value="UC21: View Grades" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="325" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="122" value="UC22: Write Review (Posudek)" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="390" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="123" value="UC23: Publish Project" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="455" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="124" value="UC24: Bulk Publish Projects" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="520" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" value="Supervisor" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="150" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="201" value="Opponent" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#f39c12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="360" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="202" value="Teacher" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#3498db;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="710" y="260" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="203" value="Student" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2ecc71;opacity=50;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="280" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="204" value="Admin" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#e74c3c;opacity=50;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="580" y="470" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="300" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" source="200" target="118" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="301" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" source="200" target="119" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="302" value="supervisor grades" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#555555;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" source="200" target="120" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="303" value="supervisor review" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#555555;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" source="200" target="122" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="310" value="opponent grades" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#555555;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#f39c12;" parent="1" source="201" target="120" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="311" value="opponent review" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#555555;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#f39c12;" parent="1" source="201" target="122" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="320" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#2ecc71;" parent="1" source="203" target="121" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="330" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#e74c3c;" parent="1" source="204" target="123" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="331" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#e74c3c;" parent="1" source="204" target="124" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="400" value="" style="endArrow=block;endFill=0;endSize=12;html=1;strokeColor=#9b59b6;" parent="1" source="200" target="202" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="401" value="" style="endArrow=block;endFill=0;endSize=12;html=1;strokeColor=#f39c12;" parent="1" source="201" target="202" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="502" value="<i>&lt;&lt;include&gt;&gt;</i>
submit with review" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontSize=10;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#555555;" parent="1" source="120" target="122" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="50" y="285" /> <mxPoint x="50" y="415" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="504" value="<i>&lt;&lt;include&gt;&gt;</i>
must be locked first" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontSize=10;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#555555;" parent="1" source="123" target="118" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="60" y="480" /> <mxPoint x="60" y="155" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
